subject: [COMMON] Improve mariadb-init job script
commit_message:
[COMMON] Improve mariadb-init job script

Replace two sets of commands with a simple loop.

Issue-ID: OOM-2248
Change-Id: I83a748cdad256e7206310d45a987530b4acc621b
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

On https://orange-opensource.gitlab.io/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap-view/results/100105-1/infrastructure-healthcheck/k8s/onap-k8s.log, we see that NBI cannot connect to its MariaDB.

As it's using mariadb-init, I assume it doesn't work as expected
Uploaded patch set 2.
